name: Saddle Creek Ranch
summary: A standout master-planned community in Cibolo featuring a dog park, golf course, and resort-style pool. One of the most amenity-rich neighborhoods in the I-35 corridor with SCUCISD schools.

name: Falcon Ridge
summary: An established neighborhood near FM 1103 with mature trees and a strong community identity. Falcon Ridge offers solid home values and convenient access to shopping and dining.

name: Bentwood Ranch
summary: A family-focused community known for its neighborhood events and welcoming atmosphere. Bentwood Ranch is a popular choice for military families near Randolph AFB.

name: Turning Stone
summary: An executive-level neighborhood offering larger homes with upgraded finishes and generous lot sizes. Turning Stone attracts move-up buyers looking for premium homes in SCUCISD.

name: Cibolo Valley Ranch
summary: A newer community offering affordable homes for families and first-time buyers. With modern floor plans and community amenities, it's one of the best values in the Cibolo area.

name: Verde Ranch
summary: A newer master-planned community with a community pool, playground, and modern homes. Verde Ranch offers a fresh neighborhood feel with all the benefits of SCUCISD schools.
